last_review_summary: Round 3: Core verifier architecture fixed — monkey-patched attention forward replaces post-hook, native SDPA never loads FP prefix KV. Baselines (RTN/KIVI/Absmax) implemented. Downstream tasks (GSM8K/HumanEval/MMLU/MT-Bench), comprehensive ablations (5 types), real TV distance, real layer sensitivity all added. FP prefix KV evicted after compression. 42 tests passing. Pipeline: 10 phases, dual-GPU enforced.
